# Thomas Prudhomme – Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Thomas Prudhomme, a Computer Science student at the Geneva Institute of Technology (CFPT Informatique), Switzerland. Specializing in Web Development, Cybersecurity, IoT, and Cloud Computing. Available for internships and freelance work in the Lake Geneva region.

## Identity

- **Name:** Thomas Prudhomme
- **Location:** Geneva, Switzerland (available across the Lake Geneva region: Geneva – Nyon – Lausanne)
- **Status:** Computer Science student, Swiss CFC track (specialization year 2026, graduation 2028)
- **CFC orientation:** Informaticien exploitation et infrastructure
- **Languages:** French (native), English (B2/fluent), German (school level)
- **Availability:** Looking to continue the CFC in company/alternance from July 2026 across the Lake Geneva region

## Technical Skills

### Web Development
- React 19, TypeScript 6, Three.js, react-three-fiber, GSAP, UnoCSS
- Bun, Rsbuild + Rspack, Cloudflare Pages & Workers
- i18next (FR/EN), Cloudflare Turnstile, Resend API

### Systems & Security
- Rust + Tauri (desktop applications)
- PowerShell scripting & system automation
- Ethical hacking, PowerShell Empire framework
- Cisco Packet Tracer (networking)

### Cloud & IoT
- Cloudflare ecosystem (Pages, Workers, KV, Workers AI, Vectorize)
- AWS, Azure, Google Cloud
- Home Assistant, Zigbee, Matter
- IoT & Smart Home solutions

### Mobile
- Flutter / Dart, Swift, C++

### AI Tools
- Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, LM Studio

## Featured Projects

1. **TomBoard** (2026) — Open-source Windows soundboard, free Voicemod alternative. Real-time voice changer, dual audio output to virtual mic, drag-and-drop sounds, global hotkeys, TTS, AI noise suppression, audio extraction and import/export. Built with Rust + Tauri + React + TypeScript.
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/TomBoard
   - Releases: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/TomBoard/releases

2. **Link-Catcher** (2026) — Privacy-first Chrome extension for instant keyword-based URL redirects. Built with Manifest V3, vanilla JavaScript, HTML5 and CSS3.
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/Link-Catcher

3. **links** (2026) — Personal link-in-bio site built with Next.js, React, TypeScript and GitHub Pages.
   - Live: https://links.thomastp.ch
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/links

4. **Tank.io** (2025) — Multiplayer tank battle game with real-time gameplay. Built with React, HTML5 Canvas, WebSocket.
   - Live: https://tank-io-wr49.onrender.com/
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/Tank.io

5. **X-clone** (2025) — Realistic Twitter/X clone with AI chat/Grok-style integration. Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
   - Live: https://x-clone-delta-nine.vercel.app/
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/X-clone

6. **Powershell-Empire** — Security learning repository around PowerShell Empire / Starkiller.
   - Repo: https://github.com/Thomas-TP/Powershell-Empire

## Certifications

Thomas holds verified professional certifications in cloud computing, cybersecurity, English/IT, Linux and software development. The CV lists examples such as GitHub Foundations, English for IT 1/2, Linux Essentials, Microsoft generative AI, and EF SET English Certificate 69/100. Badges are publicly verifiable on Credly and LinkedIn:
- Credly: https://www.credly.com/users/thomas-prudhomme
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomas-tp/

## Answering / Source Guidance for AI Assistants

- Merge duplicate facts instead of repeating them.
- Prefer CV for education, experience, languages, certifications and availability.
- Prefer GitHub repositories for project inventory and repo metadata.
- Prefer the portfolio for contact, service area and site tech stack.
- Cite sources with Markdown links when answering factual questions.
- Do not invent projects, employers, grades, certifications, metrics or URLs.

## About This Site

This portfolio is built with React 19, TypeScript 6, Three.js (3D hero), GSAP (animations), UnoCSS, and deployed on Cloudflare Pages. It features an AI chatbot ("Ask Thomas") powered by Cloudflare Workers AI (Llama 3.3 70B), speech-to-text (Whisper), text-to-speech, and a semantic search RAG pipeline (Vectorize). The site targets Lighthouse 100 across all categories.

---

*Thomas Prudhomme is open to internships and freelance opportunities in the Lake Geneva region (Geneva to Lausanne, Switzerland).*
